pantheon.configuration.title: Pantheon Configs
pantheon.configuration.logDirtBlock.tool: Whether to log the dirt block on common setup
pantheon.configuration.magicNumberIntrod: What you want the introduction message to be for the magic number
pantheon.configuration.items.tooltip: A list of items to log on common setup
pantheon.configuration.islandAnchorA.too: BlockPos of faction A's island anchor (Temple block). Format: 'x y z'
pantheon.configuration.islandAnchorB.too: BlockPos of faction B's island anchor (Temple block). Format: 'x y z'
pantheon.configuration.defaultSeasonDura: Default season duration in days (0 = open-ended). Used by /pantheon season start with no arg.
